question: Which Texas counties had between 700 and 4,600 people entering the state prison system in each fiscal year from 2019 to 2022, and which of those counties had 2020 census population under 900,000? Across the remaining counties, how many national protected areas are there? Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore.config import Config
from botocore import UNSIGNED

source = "datagov/texas-department-of-criminal-justice-receives-fy-2019/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"

s3 = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
obj = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

county = df["County"].astype(str).str.strip()
counts = county[county.ne("") & county.ne("Nan")].value_counts()
answer = counts[counts.between(700, 4600)].index.tolist()
1.subquestion: Which Texas counties had TDCJ criminal intakes between 700 and 4,600 in FY 2019?

5.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore.config import Config
from botocore import UNSIGNED

source = "datagov/2020-census-redistricting-data-all-texas-counties/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
candidates = ["Bexar", "El Paso", "Hidalgo", "Montgomery"]

s3 = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
obj = s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

sumlev = pd.to_numeric(df["SUMLEV"], errors="coerce")
county = df["BASENAME"].astype(str).str.strip()
population = pd.to_numeric(df["POP100"], errors="coerce")
answer = [
    name
    for name in candidates
    if (sumlev.eq(50) & county.eq(name) & population.lt(900000)).any()
]
5.subquestion: Which counties from <hop 1 answer> had 2020 census population under 900,000?

6.fact: National protected areas in El Paso County are Chamizal National Memorial and El Camino Real de Tierra Adentro National Historic Trail (part).
6.subquestion: For this county from <hop 2 answer>, how many national protected areas are there?

7.fact: National protected areas in Hidalgo County are Lower Rio Grande Valley National Wildlife Refuge (part) and Santa Ana National Wildlife Refuge.
7.subquestion: For this county from <hop 2 answer>, how many national protected areas are there?

8.fact: The national protected area in Montgomery County is Sam Houston National Forest (partial).
8.subquestion: For this county from <hop 2 answer>, how many national protected areas are there?
